top_signals.title: Stocks Advance as AI Rally Counters Oil Rebound: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: The artificial-intelligence trade locked in fresh gains on Monday, allowing global equities to shrug off a rebound in oil prices as the US and Iran remained deadlocked over a peace deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Record EM Rally Leads Two Hedge Funds to Turn Away Investors
top_signals.summary: There’s so much cash going to emerging markets that a pair of hedge funds that specialize in hard-to-reach debt are starting to turn away investors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SoftBank overtakes Toyota after over 20 years to become Japan’s largest company
top_signals.summary: Demand for AI stocks powers tech giant’s shares as it takes top spot by market capitalisation
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nikkei ends at record high on Middle East optimism
top_signals.summary: The benchmark index of 225 selected issues listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange's Prime section ended the day up 604.83 points, or 0.91%, from Friday at 66,934.33.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
